title: 9 Herbal Creams For Angina
description: Zingiber officinale creams contains a high concentration of gingerols and shogaols, active constituents that have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce inflammation in the blood vessels, which can contribute to angina symptoms. The anti-inflammatory properties also help to relax the muscles in the blood vessels, improving blood flow and reducing blood pressure.
